summary: Completed comprehensive e2e testing of Solaris Films website. All backend APIs (14/14 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly. Dark navy theme with yellow accents properly implemented. ChatBot with Claude AI integration working. Forms submit successfully to MongoDB.
critical_code_review_comments: All components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Forms have proper validation and error handling
ChatBot uses Claude Sonnet 4.5 correctly with EMERGENT_LLM_KEY
MongoDB integration working for quotes and contacts
Responsive design works well on mobile
seed_data_creation: Test data created during API tests with TEST_ prefix
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: Homepage with hero/services/testimonials, Preventivo form, Contatti form, Servizi page with 5 services, Chi Siamo with references, Blog with category filter, ChatBot with AI responses, Mobile responsive menu. Backend APIs: /api/health, /api/quote, /api/contact, /api/chat, /api/services, /api/stats, /api/blog all working.

homepage.details: Dark navy background, yellow accents, hero section with gradient text, floating stat badges, services section with 5 clickable cards, process section, testimonials, footer

navigation.details: Header navigation works for all pages: Home, Servizi, Chi Siamo, Blog, Contatti, Preventivo

chatbot.details: Toggle button appears, opens chat window, sends messages, receives AI responses via /api/chat endpoint using Claude Sonnet 4.5

quote_form.details: Preventivo page form submits to /api/quote and shows success message

contact_form.details: Contatti page form submits to /api/contact and shows success message

servizi_page.details: Renders all 5 services (antisolari, sicurezza, privacy, lcd-switch, fotocromatiche) with details and CTA buttons

chi_siamo_page.details: Renders company info, 40 years experience, MADICO distributor info, references grid

blog_page.details: Renders 4 blog posts with category filter (Tutti, Guide, Normative, Innovazione, Case Study)

mobile_responsive.details: Mobile menu toggle works, navigation works, chatbot works on mobile viewport
